title: Tradeweb executes real-time tokenized US Treasury transaction on Canton Network
message_html: Tradeweb executes real-time tokenized US Treasury transaction on Canton Network ...
snippet: Franklin Templeton transferred a tokenized US Treasury to Virtu Financial in what Tradeweb said was the first real-time transaction settled against USDCx.

title: BitMine, Sharplink and Joe Lubin Accelerate Wall Street Ethereum Push With Nonprofit Launch
message_html: BitMine, Sharplink and Joe Lubin Accelerate Wall Street Ethereum Push With Nonprofit Launch ...
snippet: Ethereum Institutional will serve as a point of contact for financial institutions seeking to get more involved with on-chain infrastructure.

title: Solana-based prediction market app on Phantom wallet launches
message_html: Solana-based prediction market app on Phantom wallet launches ...
snippet: “Prediction markets are one of the most powerful applications you can build on a high-performance blockchain,” said Solana Foundation.
